title: fitParameters operation
description: Levenberg-Marquardt regression of thermoPackage parameters against experimental data.  Each parameter is identified by a dot-path into the thermoPackage with `initial` / `min` / `max`; the residual block selects what to fit against (e.g. T_bubble vs x at a given P) and supplies the experimental points.  Outputs two CSVs: a fit log (chi^2 + parameter trajectory per iteration) and a parity CSV (model vs experiment at the optimum).  The PropsView renders the fit log as a chi^2 + parameter-trajectory plot, and the parity CSV as a scatter against the y=x line.

parameters.title: Parameters to fit
parameters.description: Each entry identifies a scalar in the thermoPackage to vary, with bounds and an initial guess.  `path` is dot-separated (e.g. `activityModel.pairs[0].a_ij`).

residual.title: Residual definition
residual.description: What to fit against (e.g. T_bubble at a fixed P) + the experimental data points.

data.title: Experimental data (flat pairs of x, y)

options.title: LM options
options.description: Tuning knobs for the Levenberg-Marquardt loop (lambda, tolerance, maxIter).  Defaults are fine for most cases.
